instant_pot_chicken_chili.title: Instant Pot Chicken Chili
instant_pot_chicken_chili.description: A hearty chili made in the Instant Pot.
instructions: Add all ingredients to the Instant Pot.
Pressure cook on high for 20 minutes.
Shred the chicken with two forks.

slow_cooker_beef_stew.title: Slow Cooker Beef Stew
slow_cooker_beef_stew.description: A classic beef stew, low and slow in the crock pot.
slow_cooker_beef_stew.notes: Freezer friendly. Make ahead and reheat.
instructions: Place beef in the slow cooker.

grilled_salmon_rice_bowl.title: Grilled Salmon Rice Bowl
grilled_salmon_rice_bowl.description: Fresh grilled salmon over jasmine rice with veggies.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package directions.
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side.
Assemble bowls with rice, salmon, and toppings.

quick_pasta_aglio_olio.title: Quick Pasta Aglio e Olio
instructions: Meanwhile, saute garlic in olive oil until golden.
Toss pasta with the garlic oil.

sheet_pan_chicken_veggies.title: Sheet Pan Chicken and Vegetables
sheet_pan_chicken_veggies.description: Easy weeknight dinner on one pan.
instructions: Arrange chicken and vegetables on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and season.
Bake for 25 minutes until chicken is cooked through.

tofu_stir_fry.title: Tofu Stir Fry with Vegetables
tofu_stir_fry.description: A quick and easy vegetarian stir fry.
instructions: Add vegetables and stir-fry for 3 minutes.

no_cook_summer_salad.title: No-Cook Summer Salad
no_cook_summer_salad.description: A refreshing no-cook salad for hot days.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.

dutch_oven_pot_roast.title: Dutch Oven Pot Roast
dutch_oven_pot_roast.description: Classic pot roast braised in a dutch oven.
instructions: Sear the roast on all sides in the dutch oven.
Cover and braise in the oven for 3 hours.
